EmailTemplate.description: Recap email sent to User after an he has created and saved a log
EmailTemplate.name: Easy Log : Email sent to User when a record is created
EmailTemplate.subject: New Easy Log created : {!Bug_Log__c.Name}
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hello {!Bug_Log__c.CreatedBy} !
Thank you for your email,
We confirm that your record has been created with the number {!Bug_Log__c.Name} Follow the link : https://carmignac-crm.lightning.force.com/lightning/r/Bug_Log__c/{!Bug_Log__c.Id}/view
You have informed support team that :
{!Bug_Log__c.Type__c} on {!Bug_Log__c.App__c} related to {!Bug_Log__c.Object__c} :
{!Bug_Log__c.Description__c}
It is {!Bug_Log__c.PrioritySeverity__c} and you wish that it will be resolved on {!Bug_Log__c.Expected_Date__c}."
The support team has received you request.
You will receive a confirmation by email when Support team will start the investigation. We advise you to regulary check the Chatter Tab on your record to follow up actions and questions from Support Team
We assure you that Support Team will do everything they can to solve your request !
